# Security Policy

## Overview

This project is a local-first transcription and speaker correction system.

While it is not intended to handle highly sensitive data by default, security and responsible disclosure are still important.

---

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security issue, please **do not open a public issue**.

Instead, report it privately via:

heinrichs@zenops.co.za

Please include:
- a clear description of the issue
- steps to reproduce (if applicable)
- potential impact

---

## What to Expect

- Reports will be reviewed as soon as reasonably possible
- Valid issues will be addressed in a future update
- You may be contacted for clarification if needed

There are no formal SLAs at this stage of the project.

---

## Scope

This policy applies to:

- the CLI application
- local processing workflows
- handling of input/output files
- any scripts or integrations within the repository

---

## Responsible Disclosure

Please:
- allow reasonable time to investigate and fix issues before public disclosure
- avoid accessing or modifying data that does not belong to you

---

## Notes

This project is designed to run locally and does not rely on external services for core functionality. However, care should still be taken when handling recordings and generated transcripts, especially if they contain sensitive information.
